nonBlockingIssues.description: Dead code in test setup: createTestApp() creates unused Express app
No fetch timeout on OllamaService methods - requests block indefinitely if Ollama hangs
Non-streaming chat() method tested but never called by any route
Validation message inconsistency: empty string triggers generic 'required' instead of 'non-empty' message
Test code duplication: offline scenario tests inline full route handler instead of using shared helper
buildChatMessages() in chat.ts duplicates greeting injection logic already in buildConversationContext() in persona.ts
Tests use 'as any' to access private methods, conflicts with project conventions
Session state machine permits intro→summary direct transition, bypassing intended conversation flow
No unit tests for sendMessage streaming loop in sessionStore
pendingProfileId module variable not cleared in resetSession()
Array index used as React key in SessionSummary action items list
No AbortController on streaming fetch - potential leak on navigation
Duplicated formatting functions (formatDuration, formatDate, formatTime) between SessionHistory.tsx and SessionDetail.tsx
Defensive parsing for backend action_items type mismatch (JSON string vs array)

appliedUpdates.description: Created frontend-ui-patterns.md documenting: inline SVG icon system (no icon library used), ancient Rome aesthetic patterns (warm stone colors, serif fonts, CSS custom properties), test database UUID-naming convention for isolation, and Ollama health check via /api/tags endpoint

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for shared utility placement: when formatting or utility functions are needed by multiple components, extract them to src/lib/ or src/utils/ rather than duplicating in individual components.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: core-session-history-ui feature duplicated formatDate, formatDuration, formatTime between SessionHistory.tsx and SessionDetail.tsx

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update frontend-worker skill to clarify that Playwright e2e tests are optional when agent-browser skill is responsible for UI flow verification. The current skill step 2 ('Write failing Playwright e2e tests for user flows') conflicts with actual codebase patterns and causes unnecessary skill procedure deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: core-meditation-chat-ui worker followed unit/component test pattern consistent with rest of codebase, but deviated from skill's e2e test requirement. Worker's skillFeedback confirmed this was justified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add TypeScript testing convention: when private methods must be tested, use explicit type casts or @ts-expect-error rather than casting to 'any'. This avoids losing type safety while still accessing the methods under test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: core-marcus-persona review flagged 'as any' casts in sessionSummary.test.ts for accessing private parse methods. AGENTS.md says 'avoid any' but provides no test-specific guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Test model pattern: using nonexistent 'test-model' to simulate Ollama errors may confuse future workers
rejectedObservations.reason: The test files already document this pattern inline. Workers can discover it from reading existing tests. Not actionable for AGENTS.md guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Singleton pattern fragility in end-and-summarize endpoint
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an implementation detail specific to one endpoint. Not systemic and already noted in the feature review for future workers to find.
